title: Source Schema Submission Request
description: Valid payload for both POST /api/source-schemas/test-fetch and POST /api/source-schemas/community-submissions

name.description: Human-readable name of the calendar source

examples: Public events from La Center, WA

type.description: The source type detected from the feed

feedUrl.description: Absolute URL of the calendar feed (HTTP or HTTPS)

schemaDefinition.description: JSON schema definition as a STRING (not an object). For Ics, typically '{}' or validation-only. For other types, includes parsing rules like eventArrayPath and mappings.

metadata.description: Optional metadata about the source. Use only documented fields and customAttributes fallback keys.

location.description: Geographic location: city, state, region, or venue name

contactEmail.description: Email for questions about this source

estimatedEventCount.description: Approximate number of events published per month

eventStartNotBeforeDate.description: Only include events whose start date is on or after this date (YYYY-MM-DD)

eventFallbackUrl.description: Absolute URL used when an event has no eventUrl

customAttributes.description: Optional fallback attributes. Supported keys: defaultLocation, defaultVenueAddress.

defaultLocation.description: Fallback event location when location is missing

defaultVenueAddress.description: Fallback event venueAddress when venueAddress is missing

calendarStrategyOverride.description: Optional override for how events are calendared (default: Auto)

examples.name: La Center Calendar
examples.description: Public ICS feed from La Center, WA
